offer: For property managers processing 5–15 lease payments/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of lease payments and bank transactions.
problem: Inaccurate financial records due to untracked lease payments.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of lease payment records
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Short demo video showing manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
